what: Check if other knowledge entries depend on this one via required_knowledge
why: Warn user before deleting a dependency

output.console: Dependency check result listing any entries that reference this one

success_handling.criteria: Dependency scan completes and no other entries reference this entry via required_knowledge

error_handling.criteria: One or more knowledge entries reference this entry in their required_knowledge field
error_handling.action: Warn user with the list of dependent entries, require explicit confirmation before proceeding

decisions.condition: Has dependents and user confirms deletion
